MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PLAZA SERVICES, LLC MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to transfer venue" is granted. Plaintiff shall pay all transfer costs.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-19-2023 Continued To Sep-12-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
